prompt:
A small commemorative token displayed on a dark presentation surface, with a polished metallic finish and simple geometric iconography suggesting early access or first-wave participation. The design should feel like a collectible reward item rather than a formal medal, with subtle stand or case details that make it clear this is an earned token.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a premium near-future maker-award aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic metal sheen, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the token centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a DSPACE recognition item.
